entries.text:
Verse 9

Part III. The ultimate blessing of Israel in the kingdom chapter divider.

The response of Jehovah continues to the end, but at Hosea 13:9 changes to entreaty and promise.

Verse 14

redeem Heb. goel, Redemp. (Kinsman type). (See Scofield "Isaiah 59:20").

death, 1 Corinthians 15:55.

O grave Heb. "Sheol," also in preceding clause. (See Scofield "Habakkuk 2:5") .
